global.description: The ad features a gray background with promotional text and shapes.

elements.label: Gray background
elements.description: A simple gray background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: Two overlapping squares
elements.description: Two empty, overlapping squares positioned in the center, suggesting a product or feature.

elements.label: Another square
elements.description: A smaller empty square located slightly below the two overlapping squares.

elements.label: Small square
elements.description: A small empty square positioned below the previous square.

elements.label: Circle shape
elements.description: A small circular shape located towards the bottom left of the canvas.

elements.label: Discount offer
elements.description: Bold text stating 'Up to 40% off Only this weekend' in a prominent position at the bottom.
elements.text_content: Up to 40% off Only this weekend

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A bold button with the text 'Book now' positioned directly below the discount offer.

elements.label: ThreadMark logo
elements.description: The logo 'ThreadMark' displayed in a bold font at the top left of the ad.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small 'SALE' badge in a bright color located at the top right corner.
